scripts.pretest:e2e: npm run build --prefix ../packages/engine && npm run build --prefix ../functions && npm run build:e2e-bridge --prefix ../functions
scripts.test:e2e:ui: npm run pretest:e2e && firebase emulators:exec --project mikeadair-catan --only auth,firestore "bash e2e/run-with-bridge.sh --ui"
scripts.test:e2e:screenshots: npm run pretest:e2e && firebase emulators:exec --project mikeadair-catan --only auth,firestore "bash e2e/run-with-bridge.sh --project=desktop-1080p"
scripts.test:e2e:latency: npm run pretest:e2e && firebase emulators:exec --project mikeadair-catan --only auth,firestore "bash e2e/run-with-bridge.sh --config=playwright.latency.config.ts"
